notes: SoundCloud music streaming homepage. Header with Sign In/Create Account buttons, search bar, trending tracks, player controls at bottom. No shopping cart — SoundCloud is a streaming platform, not an e-commerce site. Cookie consent banner not visible in screenshot.

endpoints.description: Search input for artists, tracks, albums, playlists
